setup.note: Official Zoom MCP server endpoint pattern verified from Zoom docs. Zoom remote MCP servers require manual client registration through a Zoom Marketplace General app, OAuth scopes for the relevant product tools, and OAuth 2.1-compatible authorization code with PKCE. Zoom docs state DCR and Client ID Metadata Documents are not supported. References: https://developers.zoom.us/docs/mcp/servers/ and https://developers.zoom.us/docs/mcp/servers/connect-to-zoom-mcp-servers/

inputs.label: Zoom OAuth Client
inputs.description: Client ID and Client Secret from your Zoom Marketplace app.
inputs.note: Add FlexiGPT's OAuth redirect URL to the Zoom app's OAuth redirect URL settings.
